content.en:
Heavenly Fire Sect.

The two Heavenly Monarchs were discussing a matter.

They are the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Fire Sect and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch, both of them are very strong, both are at the peak of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and their strength has reached the ranks of the Heavenly Monarch List, although they are only at the end of the Heavenly Monarch List, but it is enough to prove their strength.

The two of them were also the rulers of the Heavenly Fire Sect in the Great Universe.

"The Great Universe is going to be chaotic, it is both a challenge and a great opportunity for our Heavenly Fire Sect!" White Eagle Heavenly Monarch said with a smile: "In the past, we would shrink our hands and feet, but now we can let go of our hands and feet, and not long ago, a true ancestor of the Heavenly Fire Sect conveyed a message, let us deal with the disciples of the Void Heaven One Line!"

"It is rumored that the true ancestor of our Heavenly Fire Sect has a grudge against the Void Heaven Ancestor, it seems to be true, the previous True Ancestor did not dare to attack the Void Heaven Ancestor, because it was easy to be discovered, and thus was targeted by the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Sect. But now, as long as any fight in the universe is hidden, you are not afraid of others to figure it out. Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch said with a smile.

"Hmph, the Void Heaven Pulse has a few Dao Ancestors, and the number of True Ancestors is far beyond our Tianhuo Sect, suppressing our Tianhuo Sect everywhere, the last time Pengyu Tianjun snatched an opportunity from us, and I agree very much with the Void Heaven Sect. Moreover, the True Ancestor has given us benefits, so we naturally have to do things well. But if you kill an ordinary disciple, it will have no effect on the Void Heaven Pulse at all. "The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch said.

"The strength of Peng Yu Tianjun and several other top Heavenly Monarchs is very strong, and we can't kill them at all. You can choose to kill a few weaker Heavenly Monarchs, or let's directly attack the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi of the Void Heaven One Vein. "

Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch said coldly.

"What, to make a move on the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi of the Void Heaven Bloodline? That's the Dao Ancestor's own inheritance!"

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch was taken aback, his previous idea was just to kill a genius Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven lineage, and he didn't want to deal with Ye Tian at all, because Ye Tian's status was too high!

Once Ye Tian falls, it will be enough to shake the entire Great Universe, and even cause the wrath of the Dao Ancestor!

"Killing a Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son is more retaliatory than killing 100 Heavenly Monarchs, if that True Ancestor knows that we have killed Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son, we will definitely be overjoyed, and even give us a rich reward! That True Ancestor is the top True Ancestor, just give us a little thing, it will be worth us to benefit for countless years!"

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch hesitated for a long time, and finally gritted his teeth and said: "It's done, Wanfa Daozi is the Heavenly Destiny Realm Heavenly Monarch who will be promoted by the nine-star peak god, and he is also a detached person, and his status is even much higher than that of the ordinary nine-star peak god general Tianjiao, and he can definitely easily grow into the strongest true ancestor in the future, and he can even leapfrog to fight against the weaker true ancestor." This kind of genius is growing too fast, fortunately, he has only become a Heavenly Monarch now, and his strength is still very weak, otherwise we won't be able to deal with him at all, so we must do it as soon as possible. "

"No, we won't make a move!" Lieyang Tianjun shook his head and said: "If we make a move, even if Dao Ancestor can't calculate, but if someone chases and kills from the traces of his hands, maybe there is really hope to trace it to us, even if there is no evidence, do you think people in the Void Heaven will pay attention to evidence? I'm afraid they will directly attack us and let us bury Wanfa Daozi." "

"Then how do you kill the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi?" asked the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch.

"The Dark God Society!" "The Dark God Society is not afraid of the Void Heaven Bloodline, and they dare to assassinate anyone, although we need to pay a lot of money to ask the Dark God Society to make a move, but the True Ancestor of the Heavenly Fire Sect will definitely compensate us for our losses." In addition, that Wanfa Daozi must be extraordinary, it is said that there is a large amount of obsidian gold and source stones, and the Dark God Society must also want to take on the task of assassinating him. "

"Okay, then ask the Dark God Society to help, but we can't let the Dark God Society know who we are. "The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch said.

Subsequently, the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch secretly invited the Dark God Society, and the Dark God Society also took this task, but as for when the assassination will be completed, it depends on the situation.

For example, Ye Tian is now in the Void Heaven Palace, no matter how bold the Dark God is, it is impossible to directly enter the Void Heaven Palace, wouldn't it be looking for death.

In a flash, tens of thousands of years have passed.

Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Void Heaven Palace, and he didn't come out at all.

On this day, Ye Tian finally ended his retreat.

The cultivation increase effect brought by breaking through the realm is basically much weaker, and it is basically impossible for Ye Tian to quickly improve his strength now, so he can only rely on his strength to survive, or get a big opportunity.

"The eighth layer of the Xuanxuan Technique is Xiaocheng, several Chaos Divine Powers are at the peak of entry, and the two major secret skill systems of the Heavenly Sword System and the Hunyuan System have basically been reorganized, and their strength has increased many times!"

This is Ye Tian's sorting out of his own strength, but there is no hope of hitting the Heavenly Monarch List.

Those Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List are not weak, all of them have been promoted to the peak of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and their physical bodies are also very strong, and they have even mastered a chaotic supernatural power, and it is a chaotic supernatural power of the Dacheng realm, and they have basically condensed the prototype of the Great Dao, at least tens of thousands of meters away.

Compared with these Heavenly Monarchs, Ye Tian has a lot of shortcomings.

But after all, Ye Tian was promoted by the Ten Star God Generals, and he was a transcendent person, far surpassing those Heavenly Monarchs from the foundation, so Ye Tian's strength was actually not very far from the last place on the Heavenly Monarch List.

The reason why Ye Tian went out of the customs this time was that the points were almost spent, and the resources on his body were not enough, so he had to collect resources again, and by the way, he would see what opportunities he had.

As a Heavenly Monarch who will be promoted to the top of the Ten Star Gods, his foundation is too solid, and every time he is promoted to a small level, it takes a lot of resources, plus the speed at which the eighth layer of the Xuanxu Jue consumes resources is too fast.

Even if he has more points, he doesn't feel like it's enough.

Not only did Ye Tian feel that the points were not enough, but the other Heavenly Monarchs even Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch felt that the resources and points were not enough, for example, Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch had cultivated countless years, how many points did it cost for such a long time?

Far more than 1 million, not even more than 10 million points.

For such a celestial monarch, if there are points, they will basically spend them in useful places, and they will lack points all the time.

Ye Tian naturally couldn't sit back and eat empty, he had to find a way to earn points.

And the human race has also found a lot of treasure lands over the years, and they have marked them one after another, Ye Tian is going to go to those treasure places to take a look, and collect some resources by the way.

When Ye Tian left the Void Heaven Palace, he was quickly known.

In a mysterious place in the universe, the Heavenly Monarchs of the Dark God Society knew Ye Tian's movements.

"Immediately execute the assassination plan, target: Wanfa Daozi!"

A set of orders was delivered.
